sections.title: Without a holy wrench in the inventory or bank

lines.speaker: Davey
lines.text: Ello again guv. I take it you're here about the wrench?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What? The Holy Wrench? But I lost it somewhere...

lines.speaker: Davey
lines.text: Well guv, maybe that's what I want you to think.

lines.speaker: Davey
lines.text: As soon as you've got somewhere to put it I'll hand it over. I'll keep it nice and holy until then.

lines.speaker: Davey
lines.text: There you go. I've kept it nice and holy for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Good! Everything seems to have worked out ok.

lines.speaker: Davey
lines.text: I'm sure it'll stay that way so long as you don't know it's missing.

lines.speaker: Davey
lines.text: Nothin' guv, you just have a nice day.
